member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Data.KnownIdentityProviders
member.summary: Supported identity providers for authentication. Order is intentional and should not be changed without review.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Data.KnownPasswordBlacklist
member.summary: Centralized list of disallowed passwords that are too common or insecure.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Data.KnownRoles
member.summary: Supported roles for production seeding. Order is intentional and should not be changed without review.
